function_reachability: Is there a call path from function 'main' to function 'printf'?

loop_reachability: Is it possible that the loop with condition 'i < n' is never executed?

dominators: Does the statement line 19:  <statement> printf("Count = %d\n\n", count); </statement> dominate line 4:  <statement> for (i = 0; i < n; i++) { </statement>?

data_dependency: Does variable count at line 3: <statement>   int i, j, k, n = 3, count = 0, breakIt = 0; </statement> determine the value stored in variable count at line 11: <statement>         count++; </statement>?

Does the value of variable j at line 5: <statement>     for (j = 0; j < n; j++) { </statement> depend on the value of variable breakIt at line 3: <statement>   int i, j, k, n = 3, count = 0, breakIt = 0; </statement>?
liveness: Is variable 'k' live at the end of function 'main'?
